response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled polyglot engineer with strong software fundamentals, but this role requires 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows—he has approximately 2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows and university work), primarily backend/web development. He lacks mandatory expertise in SQL Server/Oracle, no demonstrated Windows platform depth, and minimal capital-markets domain exposure (one brief role at an investment fintech without specific C++ capital-markets work). The C++ and domain gaps are too large to overcome.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with proven TDD, CI/CD, and DevOps infrastructure experience
Excellent communication demonstrated through multiple talks, workshops, and open-source mentorship
Java and diverse language experience shows ability to learn systems languages, plus CI/CD pipeline knowledge aligns with modern development practices
concerns: Only ~2 years of direct C++ experience versus the required 5–10 years; career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No demonstrated Windows platform expertise; background is primarily Linux and web technologies, with no mention of SQL Server or Oracle
Minimal capital-markets domain exposure—only one brief consulting role at an investment-focused startup without capital-markets or fixed-income system work
